mentions.note: Last year's winner up 23% but valuation skyrocketed to 40x earnings — now done nothing in early 2026 as rotation favors Costco.
Value-oriented retailer making things people want and selling cheaper; understable business; tangible products; reports tomorrow.
Consumer stocks soared alongside financials on peace narrative; Walmart using AI to drive merchandising and basket size growth (force multiplier, not layoff story).
Defensive stock thriving in war/economic stress environment; alongside Costco, represents value and resilience; buy now, hold long.
Safe, stable play with 45-51 cent earnings. Stock bounced off lows, pulled back, ready to run. 'Very much' like it for safety-focused investors in uncertain market.
Barely up on Day 2 despite expectations for retail leadership; pathetic parody of strength in sector.
Trading at 42x FY2027 earnings (near all-time high multiple); down 3.4% signals high prices pushing customers away; rich valuation and consumer pressure.
Johnny's portfolio: incredible run; retail consolidating terrifically; good diversifying holding.
Running hard pre-war, now reversing as oil prices/war dynamics shift sentiment; even value retailer exposed to consumer weakness.
Among greatest companies in era; revamped into place to shop for everyone, not just lower incomes. Hard to beat prices or selection.
